ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the departments table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "project_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type */,
  "project_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the project types table */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "rdc" TEXT /* Research and Development Center (RDC) where the project is hosted */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the project started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the project ended */,
  "pi" TEXT /* Principal Investigator (PI) of the project */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the project */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the departments table */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., completed, ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_type_id") REFERENCES project_types ("project_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rdcs" (
  "rdc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RDC */,
  "rdc_name" TEXT /* Name of the RDC */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the RDC */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the RDC */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the departments table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rdc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rdcs_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., status change, title change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the researchers table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., keywords, tags) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metadata_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
